name: Mexican Corn Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the jalapeno peppers.
2. Dice the tomatoes.
3. Thinly slice carrots and celery stalks.
4. Dice red peppers.
5. (Optional) Crush 2 cups of tortilla chips.
6. In a large frying pan over medium-high heat, sauté onions and garlic for 5 minutes.
7. Add jalapenos, carrots, celery, bell peppers, and all spices. Stir frequently to combine the flavors.
8. Continue cooking for 3 more minutes, stirring frequently.
9. Add the remaining ingredients (except chips), lower the heat to low, cover, and cook for about 2 hours.
10. Serve in warmed bowls, topping with crushed chips and salsa if desired.
